title: Seeing Which Dashboards are Pulling Data From any Given Board
excerpt: When I need to change the structure or data on a board, many dashboards may be impacted.  There is no way to tell which dashboards are pulling data from a given board without opening each dashboard and then clicking the …

posts.author: MatthewB (Matthew Buchmeier)
posts.cookedHtml: When I need to change the structure or data on a board, many dashboards may be impacted. There is no way to tell which dashboards are pulling data from a given board without opening each dashboard and then clicking the Connected Boards button. I have close to 50 dashboards so I’m reaching the limit of what I can manage by memory alone. Anyone who has to administer our Monday.com instance with less familiarity will face challenges. As an illustration, currently I’m having to migrate a status field for “Department” to new values. Any dashboard filtering on the this value will be impacted unless I adjust the filters in advance. Maybe you could add the board / dashboard relationships into the Content Directory in the Admin panel or in a new view?
